languages.text: Под вашим влиянием манипулус Эоганн сумел смириться с окончательной гибелью Нунциуса.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.
languages.original_text: Под вашим влиянием манипулус Эоганн сумел смириться с окончательной гибелью Нунциуса.

traits.locale_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

languages.text: Bajo tu influencia, el manipulus Eogunn por fin aceptó la realidad de la muerte de Nuncius.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: Bajo tu influencia, el manipulus Eogunn por fin aceptó la realidad de la muerte de Nuncius.

languages.text: 在你的影响下，操纵者伊奥贡终于接受了努恩修斯毁灭的事实。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: 在你的影响下，操纵者伊奥贡终于接受了努恩修斯毁灭的事实。

languages.text: Sous votre influence, le manipulus Eogunn a fait le deuil de Nuncius.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: Sous votre influence, le manipulus Eogunn a fait le deuil de Nuncius.

languages.text: Manipülus Eogunn, senin etkinle Nuncius'un nihai ölümünü kabullenebildi.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: Manipülus Eogunn, senin etkinle Nuncius'un nihai ölümünü kabullenebildi.

languages.text: Unter deinem Einfluss hat sich Manipulus Eogunn mit dem ultimativen Tod von Nuncius abgefunden.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: Unter deinem Einfluss hat sich Manipulus Eogunn mit dem ultimativen Tod von Nuncius abgefunden.

languages.text: あなたの影響で、マニピュラス・エオグンはヌンシウスの最終的な死を受け入れることができた。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn managed to come to terms with Nuncius's ultimate demise.

traits.locale_text: あなたの影響で、マニピュラス・エオグンはヌンシウスの最終的な死を受け入れることができた。
